title: Output schema of Turkish Auto Dealer Intelligence
description: This actor stores DEALER_PROFILE and RUN_SUMMARY records in the default dataset, including optional inventory analysis nested inside dealer profiles.

dealerProfiles.title: Dealer profiles
dealerProfiles.description: Structured dealer profile rows with platform, location, contact details, trust signals, and source URLs. In Apify Console this opens the dealer profile view by default.

inventoryAnalysis.title: Inventory analysis
inventoryAnalysis.description: Dealer profile rows focused on nested inventory summary metrics such as listing count and price ranges when includeInventory is enabled.

runSummary.title: Run summary
runSummary.description: RUN_SUMMARY dataset row with record counts, platform coverage, timing, and warnings for the dealer intelligence run.
